derived by accumulating the Claim Model Reimbursement Amount (CLM-MODEL-
REIMBRSMT-AMT) that is present on any of the claim records included in the stay (i.e., sum of the CLM-
MODEL-REIMBRSMT-AMT reported on the claims that comprised the stay). 

NOTE: This field will be used with future models and not just the Pennsylvania Rural Health Model 
(PARHM) (CR11355). A demo code (CLM_DEMO_ID_NUM) will be assigned for future models.
